prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-PROBESCOOP-BLK-FBA Product Type: OUTDOOR_LIVING Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor Metal Detector Plastic Sand Scoop with Steel Probe for Metal Detecting Description: The ASR Outdoor Gold Rush Gold Panning 2-in-1 Plastic Black Scoop with Steel Probe Handle is a must-have gold panning essential to include in your arsenal of gold prospecting equipment, alongside a metal detector, sluice box, gold pans, sieves and more, to help increase your gold recovery efforts.

Whether you're a seasoned gold prospector or just poking around in your local riverbed for the first time with friends or family, this plastic gold panning sand scoop shovel will help you to increase your gold recovery efforts, especially with its built-in steel probe that twists out from the top of the handle, reducing the number of tools you need on your gold prospecting field site. The integrated steel probe makes it easy to find and collect items in sand and dirt much quicker than having to reach for another tool.

The ASR Outdoor gold rush gold panning gold prospecting sand scoop or shovel is made from reinforced, heavy-duty, single-piece construction plastic; the shovel is non-metallic, rust-free and corrosion-free, allowing you to use and reuse the gold recovery tool for many gold panning seasons to come. In addition to the sand scoop's formidable construction, the shovel also boasts a deep but vibrant black color; the color choice is intentional, as it will greatly aid in your gold recovery efforts to help sort and spot and gold among in your deposit.

If treasure hunting or gold panning is a favorite past-time, or it's a new hobby that you're just digging into, be sure to add one of the ASR Outdoor Gold Rush Gold Panning 2-in-1 Plastic Black Scoop with Steel Probe Handle to your gold prospecting equipment. It will help you to better sort, spot and recover any gold nuggets or other valuable minerals or gems via it's bright black color, sturdy construction and handy, built-in steel probe. Search Terms: sand scoop metal detector tools gold prospecting equipment rush accessories detecting shovels probe beach digger panning scooper mining tool beachcomber Features: - METAL DETECTING SCOOP: This two in one ASR Outdoor black scoop digger is an essential tool in your arsenal of gold prospecting and metal detecting equipment; the scoop measures 14" from top to bottom and features a built-in steel probe for finding and collecting items in sand and dirt. - STEEL PROBE HANDLE: Twisting out from the top of the gold panning shovel, the steel probe is a handy tool to have for finding and collecting items in sand and dirt; great for gold prospecting, treasure hunters, hobbyists, metal detectors, coin collectors and more - HEAVY-DUTY PLASTIC: Constructed from reinforced, heavy-duty, single-piece construction plastic, the shovel is durable and will not rust or corrode. Since it's made of plastic, you won't have to worry about any false positives while metal detecting. - HIGH CONTRAST BLACK COLOR: The deep but vibrant black color provides an excellent backdrop for your gold, precious metal, gem stone and other mineral recovery efforts, allowing even small gold flakes to stand out from your deposit - SPECIFICATIONS: Dimensions: 4.1 inch x 14.1 inch x 10.3 inch; Steel Probe Length: 4 inches; Color: Black; Material: Molded Plastic === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
